top_categories.workout_context: 174 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 174 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
6,561ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
174 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 6,561ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Tempo is Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 174 miles on mixed terrain. Train it until it's automatic.
Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 174 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza. Train it until it feels boring.
At Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 174 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 174 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Vuelta Cicloturista a Ibiza. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Endurance, and VO2max to prepare you for 174 miles of mixed terrain in Ibiza, Balearic Islands, Spain.
